sheets.name: Master Models
sheets.role: wide consolidated table; currently 31 populated model/access rows

sheets.name: Model Router
sheets.role: current task recommendations and final rankings

knownIssues: The workbook states 51 canonical models, while Master Models currently has 31 populated rows.
Master Models mixes canonical models with duplicate access-provider rows.
Provider sometimes means model developer and sometimes access provider.
Subscription prices are repeated on model rows and must be moved to subscription records.
Some duplicate access rows have blank Model ID values.
The application must calculate counts from normalized records rather than workbook summary cells.
importPriority: Expansion Scope and Baseline Reference for roster identity
Google Model Data, Mistral & Nemotron Data, and Session 5 Model Data for detailed canonical specifications
Master Models for scores, ranks, best-use text, pricing evidence, and populated technical fields
Provider Limits for plan and pricing evidence
Model Router as a historical recommendation snapshot, not live routing logic
